{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mell's attire
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]]'s [[Doctor Nova]] disguise included a visor, [[Aethertech]] consoles on her arms, an ammo bandolier, and a white coat edged in blue.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
